title: oestlundorchis nonantzin
side_effects: Oestlundorchis nonantzin can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its toxic compounds. Improper use can also lead to cardiovascular issues, including decreased blood pressure and heart rate, which can cause dizziness and fainting. In severe cases, it can cause respiratory failure and even death due to its potent neurotoxins. Furthermore, long-term exposure to the plant's toxins can result in kidney and liver damage, highlighting the need for proper handling and medical supervision.
